positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a celestial fox spirit (kitsune), standing gracefully among abstract constellations and wisps of nebula. The fox should have a sleek, ethereal silhouette with flowing tails, rendered in deep indigo and gold ink accents. Central composition, highly stylized and symmetric, perfect for screen printing on dark apparel. Isolated subject on a clean, negative space background. High contrast, geometric detail, clean vector aesthetic, inspired by Art Deco and Japanese nature motifs. UHD, crisp focus, flat design.
